2026-04-29ESDCCanadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety ActReappointment of the governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and SafetyReappointment of Jenna Rose Brookfield of Beechville, Nova Scotia, as a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, effective June 20, 2026.N/A
act: Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety Act
subject: Reappointment of the governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety
precis: Reappointment of Jenna Rose Brookfield of Beechville, Nova Scotia, as a governor of the Council of the Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, effective June 20, 2026.
